ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the dealership */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the dealership is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the dealership is located */,
  "years_of_operation" TEXT /* Operational years of the dealership */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealership */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dealership */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the automobile manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealership_manufacturer_association" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the associated dealership */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the associated manufacturer */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date of association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealership_manufacturer_association_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealership_manufacturer_association_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership selling the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle's manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sold vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who bought the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson involved in the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_records" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being serviced */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service performed */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician performing the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, service) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership running the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered by the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership the feedback is about */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer for the vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the vehicle is in stock */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inventories_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inventories_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "work_date" TEXT /* Date of the work schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the work schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the work schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_schedules_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Employee's role (e.g., sales, service, admin) */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)
